text:
GG0170G3_CAR_TRNSFR_END_CD GG0170G3 Discharge Performance Car Transfer Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to safely transfer in and out of a car or van on the passenger side at the time of discharge. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to safely transfer in and out of a car or van on the passenger side at the time of discharge. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching
